Appearance:

MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Motion of Defendants and Cross Complainants Hughes and Sweet Leaf LLC for order compelling answer to form interrogatory 17.1 is granted. Request for sanctions is denied, since there appeared to be confusion about correct email address for counsel for Batemans/Mountain Thunder Coffee Plantation Int'l. Inc. Mtn For Order Compelling Production Of Docs & For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-25-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Motion of Defendants and Cross Complainants Hughes and Sweet Leaf LLC,and joinder by plaintiffs Lombardo and Cooke for production of documents is granted. Defendants Batemans and Mountain Thunder shall produce documents to moving parties no later than 10 days from the date of this order. Requests for sanctions denied. However, counsel for Batemans/Mountain Thunder is advised to review CCP 2020.010, and to note that failing to respond or to submit to an authorized method of discovery is a misuse of the discovery process; the fact that counsel, documents, or parties may be out of state is not an excuse. (622/M. Miller)
